figures.caption: Figure 9: Visualization of prompt evolution. As evolution progresses, the prompts become more refined.
Table 1: Performance on the LoCoMo benchmark with High-Capability Models. TriMem achieves outstanding performance across different models while maintaining high efficiency.
Figure 10: Content of retrieval entries. TriMem realizes precise retrieval when handling different questions.
Figure 11: Example of search query. Each question is divided into detailed required information during analysis process.
Table 2: Performance on the LoCoMo benchmark with Efficient Models. TriMem still achieves superior performance-efficiency balance with representative efficient models.

Figure 2: Analysis of existing agent memory systems. Although the totally extracted fact based systems enable efficient retrieval, they suffer from lossy storage and shallow reasoning. Additionally, the fixed prompt words cannot be well applied to all contexts, which compromise the performance.
Figure 12: Performance of different window size. Larger window size leads to lower extraction quality.
Table 4: Detailed results of entity profile ablation study.
Table 5: Detailed results of raw dialogue ablation study.

Figure 3: Overview of TriMem. It segments historical dialogue into windows, extracts multidimensional facts with traceable index, and constructs entity profiles. Relevant memories are retrieved according to queries, and prompts are continuously optimized via response feedback.
